title: The Forgotten Photograph
content: Inside an old library book, Chloe discovered a faded photograph of two smiling children standing beside a large tree. There was no name or date written on the back. Curious, she showed the picture to the librarian. After looking closely, the librarian recognized the tree from a nearby park. A few days later, an elderly visitor identified the children as his sister and himself many decades earlier. He had forgotten the photograph inside the book when he was young. Everyone smiled as the picture finally returned to its owner.
